name: Flying Saucer Draught Emporium

seo.title: Flying Saucer — Craft Beer Bar in Downtown Little Rock | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: Flying Saucer in the River Market District is downtown Little Rock's craft beer anchor — 200+ taps, a wide pub menu, and the weekly Tuesday trivia night that's become a local institution.

address: 323 President Clinton Ave, Little Rock, AR 72201
description: Flying Saucer is the River Market District's most reliable gathering place — a sprawling bar and restaurant with 200+ draft taps, a menu of pub food that's more ambitious than it needs to be, and a Saturday afternoon atmosphere that makes it easy to lose track of the afternoon. The UFO Club saucer-collection program has been a fixture since the chain opened its Little Rock location, and the regular crowd of saucer collectors and beer-curious locals gives it a character you don't find at chain bars. Tuesday trivia night is a genuine local institution. The outdoor seating faces onto Clinton Avenue, which is prime people-watching territory.
must_try_items: Whatever's new on the rotating taps (the beer list is the point)
Tuesday trivia (not food, but worth planning around)
